_comment: Append this object to tasks[] as the last item when planning a new sprint queue.
title: Live Council — Sprint N review (bugs + security + architecture)
doneWhen: docs/council/sprint-N-report.md exists with prioritized findings and file:line refs
notes: Last task in sprint. Use scope project on security-auditor for milestone full-repo audits (see s5-council).

members.focus: Logic errors, edge cases, test gaps, consistency across layers.
OWASP API Top 10 2023, ASVS L2, JWT/refresh, RBAC, injection, secrets. Set scope to project for full-repo baseline.
Clean Architecture boundaries, convention drift, scope creep.

synthesizer.focus: Merge, deduplicate, prioritize, list follow-up tasks for next sprint.
